_comment: Apify 'Google Maps Scraper' actor (compass/crawler-google-places). SOLO-TRACK — populated 2026-06-10 with 4 sector picks. Architecture: scrape broad (4 sectors), focus narrow (top 2 for Elena apprenticeship + outreach). Marginal Apify cost is low; human attention is expensive. See context/acquisition.md Track 2 + context/sector-evaluation-framework.md.
_strings_per_sector: 3 search terms × 5 cities = 15 strings per sector × 4 sectors = 60 total
_geographic_scope: Phoenix metro core 5 cities. Radii capture Gilbert/Glendale/Peoria/Surprise via overlap.
_post_scrape_workflow: 1) Export Apify dataset as JSON to sourcing/leads/solo-2026-MM-DD.json. 2) Run: python enrich.py leads/solo-2026-MM-DD.json --mode solo --out leads-ranked-solo. 3) Filter ranked CSV by category to see per-sector yields. 4) Pick top 2 sectors based on (a) volume of buyable-scored leads, (b) Elena gut response after seeing actual names/categories. 5) Run targeted outreach (Walking Billboard / Frame B) on top 2.
_field_note: maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch reduced from 120 → 80 because 60 search strings × 120 = up to 7,200 max places, way more than needed. 80 × 60 = 4,800 max which after dedup yields ~2,000-3,000 unique businesses across 4 sectors. enrich.py scoring filters to top buyable-profile per sector. scrapeContacts pulls emails + socials (extra credits but worth it for outreach). scrapePlaceDetailPage must stay true to get website/phone/category reliably.
_solo_track_deal_box: Target $300-500k purchase price. SDE floor ~$253k at $300k → ~$286k at $500k. Revenue floor ~$843k-$952k at 30% margin. Smaller deal than Dan track ($500k-$1M) because no Dan CPA cover + simpler operationally. See context/acquisition.md for full deal box.
_before_running: Strip the underscore-prefixed comment keys (Apify ignores them but cleaner to remove). Paste into Apify JSON editor for compass/crawler-google-places actor. Expect 30-60 min run time. Cost ~$10-25 in Apify credits depending on output volume.
